system.name: Integumentary System
system.shortDescription: Skin (largest organ, ~2 m²), hair, nails, sweat + sebaceous glands. The body's largest barrier organ — protection, temperature regulation, sensation, vitamin D synthesis, immune surveillance.

primaryStructures: Epidermis (5 layers — stratum basale, spinosum, granulosum, lucidum, corneum)
Dermis (papillary + reticular — collagen, elastin, vasculature, nerves)
anatomy.vertebralCorrelates: Dermatomes — each spinal nerve root supplies a specific skin region. Cervical: head/neck/upper limb. Thoracic: torso. Lumbar: lower limb anterior. Sacral: lower limb posterior + perineum.
anatomy.nervePlexus: Sensory: free nerve endings (pain, temp), Meissner corpuscles (light touch), Pacinian (deep pressure/vibration), Ruffini (stretch), Merkel (sustained touch).

astrologicalRulership.primaryPlanetRationale: Saturn rules the outer boundary (skin as body's edge) + chronic skin conditions + aging skin. Cornell (1933): 'Saturn rules the skin in its outer protective function.'

secondaryPlanets.rules: Skin proper, aging skin, dryness, chronic conditions, eczema/psoriasis chronic
Skin beauty, complexion, soft texture, hormonal acne
secondaryPlanets.rationale: Cornell: 'Venus rules the soft tissues, the complexion.'

secondaryPlanets.rules: Inflammatory acne, rashes, cuts, burns, hot inflammatory skin
secondaryPlanets.rationale: Cornell: 'Mars in skin signs → inflammation, redness, eruptions.'

secondaryPlanets.rules: Skin fluid balance, hydration, emotional connection (skin as emotional canvas)
secondaryPlanets.rationale: Cornell: 'The Moon rules the surface fluids.'

secondaryPlanets.rules: Skin sensitivity, allergic reactions, nervous skin (eczema with anxiety)
Skin specifically per Cornell — Aquarius rules the skin and ankles
Mysterious dermatological conditions, fungal skin issues, lupus-like
Sun-related skin issues, melanoma risk, vitiligo, healthy radiance
secondaryPlanets.rationale: Cornell: 'The Sun on the skin — both health and harm.'

axes.name: Digestive-Immune Axis (gut-skin connection)
axes.interpretation: The gut-skin axis is well-established. Eczema, acne, psoriasis often have gut/immune drivers. Address gut to clear skin.

axes.name: Emotional-Structural Axis (skin as emotional canvas)
axes.interpretation: Emotional stress manifests in skin. Cancer side: emotional eruptions, hives. Capricorn side: chronic dry restricted skin, structural skin issues.

energetics.chakra: All chakras express through skin tone/texture in that region
energetics.nervousSystemPathway: Cutaneous sensory nerves throughout. Autonomic (sweat glands, vascular tone). Skin-brain connection bidirectional.
energetics.endocrineCorrespondence: Pituitary (MSH), thyroid (skin texture), adrenals (cortisol affects skin), gonads (sex hormones — acne, body hair)
energetics.brainwaveAffinity: Sensory-rich — alpha during gentle touch, beta during pain
energetics.meridianCrossover_TCM: Lung meridian (governs skin in TCM — 'Lung rules skin'). Large Intestine. Spleen.

cellSalts.indicatedFor: Psoriasis, athlete's foot, dandruff, scaling/oily skin patterns. Carey's PRIMARY skin salt.
Dry skin, hives, eczema with watery component, salt cravings + skin issues.
Brittle nails, thinning hair, slow-healing skin, abscesses, suppuration.
Acne, abscesses, slow-healing wounds, pus-forming conditions.

supplementaryHerbs.name: Calendula
supplementaryHerbs.indicatedFor: Topical: cuts, minor burns, eczema, diaper rash

supplementaryHerbs.name: Burdock root
supplementaryHerbs.mechanism: Blood + lymph cleanser; supports skin clearing via internal cleansing
supplementaryHerbs.indicatedFor: Chronic skin conditions (eczema, psoriasis, acne) — internal

supplementaryHerbs.name: Yellow dock root
supplementaryHerbs.mechanism: Bitter, gentle laxative, supports liver-skin axis

supplementaryHerbs.name: Tea tree (Melaleuca)
supplementaryHerbs.indicatedFor: Acne, fungal skin, minor wounds — TOPICAL ONLY

modalityRecommendations.individual: Skin reflects internal state. Hydration, sleep, gut health, stress management → skin health. Topical: gentle cleansing, moisturizing, sun protection. Avoid harsh products. Address chronic conditions with healthcare provider — many have effective treatments.
modalityRecommendations.medical_astrologer: Saturn + Aquarius (skin specifically per Cornell). Venus for beauty/hormonal. Mars for inflammatory. Mercury for nervous/allergic. Gut-skin axis (Virgo-Pisces).
modalityRecommendations.reiki: Throat (Aquarius rules ankles per Cornell — but skin overall) + crown for boundary. Skin-direct gentle intention.
modalityRecommendations.bodywork_general: Lymphatic drainage supports skin clearance. Dry brushing (with training). Cupping affects skin/fascia. AVOID over active rash/infection.
modalityRecommendations.bodywork_contraindications: Active herpes/shingles lesions, MRSA, weeping eczema, severe psoriasis flare → avoid local work, refer.
modalityRecommendations.naturopathy: Gut-skin axis primary. Address food sensitivities. Probiotics. Burdock, red clover, yellow dock 'blood purifiers' (alteratives). Zinc, vitamin A, omega-3, vitamin D. Topical: avoid harsh products, support microbiome.
modalityRecommendations.acupuncture: Lung meridian (LU governs skin TCM). Large Intestine (skin-bowel link).
modalityRecommendations.ayurveda_phase2_placeholder: Rakta + Mamsa + Meda dhatus affect skin. Bhrajaka Pitta (skin Pitta — complexion). Tikta (bitter) rasayanas. Phase 2.
modalityRecommendations.pastoral_spiritual: Skin as boundary, as touch-receiver. Self-touch as spiritual practice (self-massage).

pathologies.name: Atopic Dermatitis (Eczema)
pathologies.classicalReference: Cornell (1933): 'Eczema — Mercury-Mars-Saturn afflictions; Virgo-Pisces axis tension manifests in skin.'

indicatorLanguage.individual: Eczema benefits from: identifying triggers (food, environmental, stress), excellent skin barrier care (gentle cleansing, moisturize while damp), addressing gut health, stress management. Severe or refractory eczema benefits from dermatology + functional medicine collaboration.
indicatorLanguage.practitioner: Mercury-Neptune and Virgo-Pisces configurations classically associated with atopic patterns. Gut-skin axis primary intervention. Refer for dermatology consultation for severe cases. Topical steroids appropriate when needed (steroid-phobia harms — guide clients).

modalityNotes.bodywork: Avoid active lesions. Lymphatic drainage supportive.
modalityNotes.lifestyle: Trigger identification (food: dairy/gluten common, environmental: dust mites/pollen), gut healing, stress management, omega-3, vitamin D, probiotics

redFlags: Severe widespread eczema with secondary infection → MD

pathologies.name: Psoriasis
pathologies.classicalReference: Cornell (1933): 'Psoriasis — Saturn afflictions in skin signs; chronic restricted skin function.'

indicatorLanguage.individual: Psoriasis is a chronic autoimmune skin condition requiring ongoing management. Lifestyle factors significantly affect severity: diet (anti-inflammatory), stress management, sleep, alcohol moderation, smoking cessation. Dermatology partnership for moderate-severe cases — many effective treatments available.
indicatorLanguage.practitioner: Saturn-Mars autoimmune configurations classically associated with psoriatic patterns. Functional medicine framework: gut health, food sensitivities, stress, vitamin D. Refer for dermatology. Biologics revolutionary for severe disease. Holistic adjuncts complement.

modalityNotes.bodywork: Active plaques: gentle around. Stress-reduction primary.
modalityNotes.lifestyle: AIP diet trial. Address gut health. Stress management critical. Sleep. Vitamin D optimization. Moderate alcohol.

pathologies.name: Acne Vulgaris
pathologies.classicalReference: Cornell (1933): 'Pimples, acne — Mars-Venus afflictions; adolescent under hormonal shift.'
cellSalts: Calc Sulph (PRIMARY for adolescent acne per Carey)

indicatorLanguage.individual: Acne responds to: gentle cleansing (not over-cleansing), addressing dietary triggers (high-glycemic foods, dairy for some), gut health, stress management, addressing hormones (especially adult acne). Persistent or scarring acne benefits from dermatology consultation.
indicatorLanguage.practitioner: Mars-Venus configurations classically associated with acne patterns. Hormonal acne: address insulin sensitivity, androgens (PCOS workup if women), gut. Topical retinoids, BPO standard. Refer to dermatology for moderate-severe (isotretinoin life-changing for severe cystic).

modalityNotes.bodywork: Facial work with care. Avoid spreading acne bacteria.
modalityNotes.lifestyle: Low-glycemic diet trial, dairy elimination trial, zinc, vitamin A, gentle skincare, address hormones

redFlags: Severe cystic acne with scarring → dermatology

pathologies.name: Contact Dermatitis

indicatorLanguage.individual: Contact dermatitis (rash after touching something) requires identifying the trigger (poison ivy, nickel, fragrance, etc.) and avoiding it. Topical relief: cool compress, calendula, oat baths. Persistent or spreading rash, especially with fever, needs medical evaluation.
indicatorLanguage.practitioner: Mercury-Uranus configurations align with hypersensitivity reactivity. Patch testing for chronic. Avoidance is treatment.

redFlags: Stevens-Johnson Syndrome signs (skin sloughing, mucosal involvement) → ED

complianceNotes.scopeOfPractice: Skin lesions require visual inspection. ALWAYS refer suspicious lesions (asymmetry, irregular borders, multiple colors, large diameter, evolving — ABCDE) for dermatology evaluation. Holistic adjuncts complement.
criticalReferralRules: Cellulitis (red hot tender spreading) → urgent MD
